customCSS: .cyber-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;overflow:hidden}.cyber-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(0,255,200,0.05) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,255,200,0.05) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:60px 60px;animation:cyber-scroll 20s linear infinite}.cyber-glow1{position:absolute;width:500px;height:500px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,255,200,0.12),transparent 70%);top:10%;left:-5%;animation:cyber-float1 12s ease-in-out infinite}.cyber-glow2{position:absolute;width:600px;height:600px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,0,128,0.10),transparent 70%);bottom:5%;right:-10%;animation:cyber-float2 15s ease-in-out infinite}.cyber-glow3{position:absolute;width:400px;height:400px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(100,100,255,0.08),transparent 70%);top:50%;left:40%;animation:cyber-float3 18s ease-in-out infinite}.cyber-scanline{position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 4px,rgba(0,255,200,0.015) 4px,rgba(0,255,200,0.015) 5px);pointer-events:none}@keyframes cyber-scroll{0%{background-position:0 0}100%{background-position:60px 60px}}@keyframes cyber-float1{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}50%{transform:translate(40px,30px) scale(1.1)}}@keyframes cyber-float2{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}50%{transform:translate(-50px,-20px) scale(1.15)}}@keyframes cyber-float3{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}50%{transform:translate(30px,-40px) scale(1.05)}}
